ApiServerStateEnum Enumeration

One Identity Manager API Server

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public enum ApiServerStateEnum
Members
  Member nameValueDescription
Setup0 The server is setting up and not yet processing requests.
Running1 The server is processing requests normally.
PrepareUnavailable2 The server is still accepting new requests, and processing in-flight requests, but it will soon enter the Unavailable state.
Unavailable3 The server is not accepting new requests, and there are no in-flight requests.
See Also

Reference
